events.title: Midsundtrappene – Experience one of the worlds longest continuous stone steps in Midsund
events.description: Many thousands of stone steps have been built in the mountains in the Midsund archipelago just outside Molde, where Sherpas from Nepal have built a total of more than 10,000 steps.

events.title: 7 bracing experiences on the Atlantic Road
events.description: If you’re going to visit the Atlantic Road, take the time to experience more than just the view. Here are seven of the many bracing experiences you should try near the spectacular ocean road in Northwest Norway.

events.title: Discover Molde - From fjords to mountains, all within reach
events.description: If you travel to Molde, chances are you’ll experience more than you would in many other places. Here, experiences are within reach, from the high, airy mountains to the calm fjord and out onto the open sea – from tranquil valleys to lively stages. In Molde, you can find everything you need – fresh air, space, and company – and all of this is just minutes away from small adventures.

events.title: Extraordinary caves – a magical experience
events.description: Trollkirka (the troll church) isn’t a church, despite the fact some people have actually got married there. Trollkirka consists of three limestone caves with a 14-meter waterfall, a marble pool and underground streams.
